queries.label: global-burden-guidelines
queries.term: (tuberculosis[Title/Abstract]) AND ((multidrug-resistant[Title/Abstract]) OR MDR-TB[Title/Abstract] OR RR-TB[Title/Abstract] OR pre-XDR[Title/Abstract]) AND (review[Publication Type] OR review[Title])

queries.label: sasp-xct-mechanism
queries.term: ((sulfasalazine[Title/Abstract]) OR (SLC7A11[Title/Abstract]) OR (xCT[Title/Abstract])) AND (macrophage[Title/Abstract] OR oxidative[Title/Abstract] OR inflammation[Title/Abstract] OR tuberculosis[Title/Abstract])

queries.label: tb-macrophage-immunity
queries.term: (tuberculosis[Title/Abstract]) AND (macrophage[Title/Abstract]) AND (oxidative stress[Title/Abstract] OR glutathione[Title/Abstract] OR reactive oxygen species[Title/Abstract] OR inflammation[Title/Abstract])

queries.label: host-genetics-precision
queries.term: (tuberculosis[Title/Abstract]) AND ((host genetics[Title/Abstract]) OR polymorphism[Title/Abstract] OR SNP[Title/Abstract] OR pharmacogenetic*[Title/Abstract])

manual_items.title: WHO consolidated guidelines on tuberculosis: module 4: treatment and care
WHO operational handbook on tuberculosis: module 4: treatment and care

queries.label: drtb-short-regimen-outcomes
queries.term: ((multidrug-resistant tuberculosis[Title/Abstract]) OR (pre-XDR[Title/Abstract]) OR (drug-resistant tuberculosis[Title/Abstract])) AND (short regimen[Title/Abstract] OR all-oral[Title/Abstract] OR bedaquiline[Title/Abstract] OR linezolid[Title/Abstract]) AND (trial[Title/Abstract] OR cohort[Title/Abstract] OR outcome*[Title/Abstract])

queries.label: linezolid-toxicity
queries.term: (tuberculosis[Title/Abstract]) AND (linezolid[Title/Abstract]) AND (neuropathy[Title/Abstract] OR optic neuropathy[Title/Abstract] OR toxicity[Title/Abstract] OR adverse event*[Title/Abstract])

queries.label: bedaquiline-safety-qtc
queries.term: (tuberculosis[Title/Abstract]) AND (bedaquiline[Title/Abstract]) AND (QT[Title/Abstract] OR safety[Title/Abstract] OR electrocardiogram[Title/Abstract])

queries.label: sasp-tb-clinical-translational
queries.term: ((sulfasalazine[Title/Abstract]) OR SASP[Title/Abstract]) AND (tuberculosis[Title/Abstract] OR macrophage[Title/Abstract] OR host-directed[Title/Abstract])

queries.label: xct-slc7a11-genetics
queries.term: ((SLC7A11[Title/Abstract]) OR xCT[Title/Abstract]) AND (polymorphism[Title/Abstract] OR SNP[Title/Abstract] OR genotype[Title/Abstract] OR genetics[Title/Abstract])
